# all-features section.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes together with the code.

pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::max_cpu_load: f64
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::max_cpu_temp_c: core::option::Option<f64>
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::max_heavy_processes: usize
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::max_wait: core::time::Duration
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::max_wait_count: usize
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::min_available_ram_bytes: u64
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::poll_interval: core::time::Duration
pub zenbench::prelude::GateConfig::strict: bool
impl zenbench::GateConfig
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::ci() -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::disabled() -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::max_cpu_load(self, f64) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::max_cpu_temp_c(self, core::option::Option<f64>) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::max_heavy_processes(self, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::max_wait(self, core::time::Duration) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::min_available_ram_mb(self, u64) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::strict() -> Self
impl core::clone::Clone for zenbench::GateConfig
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::clone(&self) -> zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::default::Default for zenbench::GateConfig
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenbench::GateConfig
pub fn zenbench::GateConfig::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::marker::Sync for zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenbench::GateConfig
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbench::GateConfig

pub zenbench::prelude::GroupConfig::auto_rounds: bool
pub zenbench::prelude::GroupConfig::baseline_only: core::option::Option<bool>
pub zenbench::prelude::GroupConfig::bootstrap_resamples: usize
pub zenbench::prelude::GroupConfig::cache_firewall: bool

pub fn zenbench::Suite::group<F: core::ops::function::FnOnce(&mut zenbench::BenchGroup)>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F)

pub fn zenbench::Suite::new() -> Self

pub fn zenbench::Suite::default() -> Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::Suite

impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::Suite

pub struct zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>
impl zenbench::AllocProfiler
pub const fn zenbench::AllocProfiler::system() -> Self
impl<A> zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>
pub const fn zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>::new(A) -> Self
impl<A: core::alloc::global::GlobalAlloc> core::alloc::global::GlobalAlloc for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>
pub unsafe fn zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>::alloc(&self, core::alloc::layout::Layout) -> *mut u8
pub unsafe fn zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>::alloc_zeroed(&self, core::alloc::layout::Layout) -> *mut u8
pub unsafe fn zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>::dealloc(&self, *mut u8, core::alloc::layout::Layout)
pub unsafe fn zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>::realloc(&self, *mut u8, core::alloc::layout::Layout, usize) -> *mut u8
impl<A: core::marker::Sync> core::marker::Sync for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A>
impl<A> core::marker::Freeze for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A> where A: core::marker::Freeze
impl<A> core::marker::Send for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A> where A: core::marker::Send
impl<A> core::marker::Unpin for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A> where A: core::marker::Unpin
impl<A> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A> where A: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<A> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A> where A: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<A> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbench::AllocProfiler<A> where A: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenbench::AllocStats

pub zenbench::AllocStats::reallocs_per_iter: f64

impl core::clone::Clone for zenbench::AllocStats
pub fn zenbench::AllocStats::clone(&self) -> zenbench::AllocStats

pub struct zenbench::BenchGroup
impl zenbench::BenchGroup
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::baseline(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F) where F: core::ops::function::FnMut(&mut zenbench::Bencher) + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_contended<S, Setup, Work>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, usize, Setup, Work) where S: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static, Setup: core::ops::function::Fn() -> S + core::marker::Send + 'static, Work: core::ops::function::Fn(&mut zenbench::Bencher, &S, usize) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_parallel<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, usize, F) where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&mut zenbench::Bencher, usize) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_scaling<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F) where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&mut zenbench::Bencher, usize) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_tagged<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, &[(&str, &str)], F) where F: core::ops::function::FnMut(&mut zenbench::Bencher) + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::config(&mut self) -> &mut zenbench::GroupConfig
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::new_public(impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::subgroup(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::throughput(&mut self, zenbench::Throughput) -> &mut Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::throughput_unit(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::BenchGroup

pub struct zenbench::Suite
impl zenbench::Suite

pub fn zenbench::Suite::bench_fn<O: 'static, F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F) where F: core::ops::function::FnMut() -> O + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn zenbench::Suite::compare<F: core::ops::function::FnOnce(&mut zenbench::BenchGroup)>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F)
pub fn zenbench::Suite::group<F: core::ops::function::FnOnce(&mut zenbench::BenchGroup)>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F)
pub fn zenbench::Suite::merge(&mut self, zenbench::Suite)
pub fn zenbench::Suite::new() -> Self
pub fn zenbench::Suite::push_group(&mut self, zenbench::BenchGroup)
pub fn zenbench::Suite::set_group_filter(&mut self, alloc::string::String)
impl core::default::Default for zenbench::Suite
pub fn zenbench::Suite::default() -> Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::Suite
impl !core::marker::Sync for zenbench::Suite
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenbench::Suite
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::Suite
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenbench::Suite
impl !core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbench::Suite
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenbench::SuiteResult
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::calibration: core::option::Option<zenbench::calibration::Calibration>
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::ci_environment: core::option::Option<alloc::string::String>
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::comparisons: alloc::vec::Vec<zenbench::ComparisonResult>
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::gate_wait_time: core::time::Duration
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::gate_waits: usize
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::git_hash: core::option::Option<alloc::string::String>
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::loop_overhead_ns: f64
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::run_id: zenbench::RunId
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::standalones: alloc::vec::Vec<zenbench::BenchmarkResult>
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::testbed: core::option::Option<zenbench::platform::Testbed>
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::timer_resolution_ns: u64
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::timestamp: alloc::string::String
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::total_time: core::time::Duration
pub zenbench::SuiteResult::unreliable: bool
impl zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::group_by_tag(&self, &str) -> alloc::collections::btree::map::BTreeMap<alloc::string::String, alloc::vec::Vec<(&str, &zenbench::BenchmarkResult)>>
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::load(impl core::convert::AsRef<std::path::Path>) -> std::io::error::Result<Self>
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::print_report(&self)
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::save(&self, impl core::convert::AsRef<std::path::Path>) -> std::io::error::Result<()>
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::save_charts(&self, impl core::convert::AsRef<std::path::Path>) -> std::io::error::Result<()>
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::to_csv(&self) -> alloc::string::String
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::to_html(&self) -> alloc::string::String
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::to_llm(&self) -> alloc::string::String
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::to_markdown(&self) -> alloc::string::String
impl zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::to_quickchart_markdown(&self, &zenbench::quickchart::QuickChartConfig) -> alloc::string::String
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::to_quickchart_urls(&self, &zenbench::quickchart::QuickChartConfig) -> alloc::vec::Vec<zenbench::quickchart::QuickChartUrl>
impl core::clone::Clone for zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::clone(&self) -> zenbench::SuiteResult
impl core::default::Default for zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::SuiteResult::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl serde_core::ser::Serialize for zenbench::SuiteResult

impl<'de> serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de> for zenbench::SuiteResult

impl core::marker::Freeze for zenbench::SuiteResult

impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbench::daemon::RunStatus

pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::baseline(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F) where F: core::ops::function::FnMut(&mut zenbench::Bencher) + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_contended<S, Setup, Work>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, usize, Setup, Work) where S: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + 'static, Setup: core::ops::function::Fn() -> S + core::marker::Send + 'static, Work: core::ops::function::Fn(&mut zenbench::Bencher, &S, usize) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_parallel<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, usize, F) where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&mut zenbench::Bencher, usize) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_scaling<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, F) where F: core::ops::function::Fn(&mut zenbench::Bencher, usize) + core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync + core::clone::Clone + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::bench_tagged<F>(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>, &[(&str, &str)], F) where F: core::ops::function::FnMut(&mut zenbench::Bencher) + core::marker::Send + 'static
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::config(&mut self) -> &mut zenbench::GroupConfig
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::current_subgroup(&self) -> core::option::Option<&alloc::string::String>
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::new_public(impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::subgroup(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::throughput(&mut self, zenbench::Throughput) -> &mut Self
pub fn zenbench::BenchGroup::throughput_unit(&mut self, impl core::convert::Into<alloc::string::String>) -> &mut Self

impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::BenchGroup

impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::BenchGroup

#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenbench::Summary

pub zenbench::Summary::max: f64
pub zenbench::Summary::mean: f64
pub zenbench::Summary::median: f64
pub zenbench::Summary::min: f64
pub zenbench::Summary::n: usize

pub fn zenbench::Summary::from_slice(&[f64]) -> Self
pub fn zenbench::Summary::new() -> Self
pub fn zenbench::Summary::push(&mut self, f64)
pub fn zenbench::Summary::std_dev(&self) -> f64
pub fn zenbench::Summary::std_err(&self) -> f64

pub fn zenbench::Summary::clone(&self) -> zenbench::Summary
impl core::default::Default for zenbench::Summary
pub fn zenbench::Summary::default() -> Self
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenbench::Summary
pub fn zenbench::Summary::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result

pub fn zenbench::Summary::serialize<__S>(&self, __S) -> core::result::Result<<__S as serde_core::ser::Serializer>::Ok, <__S as serde_core::ser::Serializer>::Error> where __S: serde_core::ser::Serializer
impl<'de> serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de> for zenbench::Summary
pub fn zenbench::Summary::deserialize<__D>(__D) -> core::result::Result<Self, <__D as serde_core::de::Deserializer>::Error> where __D: serde_core::de::Deserializer<'de>
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenbench::Summary
impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::Summary
impl core::marker::Sync for zenbench::Summary
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenbench::Summary
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::Summary
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenbench::Summary
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbench::Summary
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct zenbench::Testbed
pub zenbench::Testbed::arch: alloc::string::String
pub zenbench::Testbed::cpu_model: alloc::string::String
pub zenbench::Testbed::logical_cores: usize
pub zenbench::Testbed::os: alloc::string::String
pub zenbench::Testbed::physical_cores: usize
impl core::clone::Clone for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::platform::Testbed::clone(&self) -> zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::platform::Testbed::eq(&self, &zenbench::platform::Testbed) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::platform::Testbed::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::platform::Testbed::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl serde_core::ser::Serialize for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::platform::Testbed::serialize<__S>(&self, __S) -> core::result::Result<<__S as serde_core::ser::Serializer>::Ok, <__S as serde_core::ser::Serializer>::Error> where __S: serde_core::ser::Serializer
impl<'de> serde_core::de::Deserialize<'de> for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::platform::Testbed::deserialize<__D>(__D) -> core::result::Result<Self, <__D as serde_core::de::Deserializer>::Error> where __D: serde_core::de::Deserializer<'de>
impl core::marker::Freeze for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::marker::Send for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::marker::Sync for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::marker::Unpin for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenbench::platform::Testbed
impl core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenbench::platform::Testbed
pub fn zenbench::aggregate_results(alloc::vec::Vec<zenbench::SuiteResult>, zenbench::Aggregation) -> zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::black_box<T>(T) -> T
pub fn zenbench::format_ns(f64) -> alloc::string::String
pub fn zenbench::run<F: core::ops::function::FnOnce(&mut zenbench::Suite)>(F) -> zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::run_and_save<F: core::ops::function::FnOnce(&mut zenbench::Suite)>(F) -> zenbench::SuiteResult
pub fn zenbench::run_gated<F: core::ops::function::FnOnce(&mut zenbench::Suite)>(zenbench::GateConfig, F) -> zenbench::SuiteResult
